backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Asset, RepairTicket, Part, AuditEntry, AppUser, Client) and state maps for an asset repair tracking system, with access control mixins and helper functions for ID generation and audit logging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a dark mode contrast fix across KPI cards, chart widgets, and dashboard sections, listing affected frontend files and associated components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, key fixes, and dark mode token usage.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application entry point that sets up TanStack Router with authentication gating via Internet Identity, profile setup modal, theme provider, and route definitions for all pages.
frontend/src/components/AddAssetForm.tsx: Dialog form component for registering new assets, featuring a dynamic client dropdown populated from the backend and semantic CSS tokens for dark mode compatibility.
frontend/src/components/AddPartForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding a new inventory part, with fields for part number, name, compatible model, stock quantity, and low stock threshold, using the useAddPart mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AssetDetailModal: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected asset including its metadata and full repair history fetched via useGetRepairsBySerial.
frontend/src/components/EditAssetForm.ts: A dialog form for editing an existing asset's model, client, status, and condition fields, submitting changes via the useUpdateAsset mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The top navigation header displaying the app logo/title, current user profile with role badge, a theme toggle button, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/KPICard.tsx: A reusable card component for displaying a key performance indicator with a title, value, optional description, icon, and trend indicator.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application layout component that composes the Sidebar, Header, and a main content area rendering either children or a router Outlet.
frontend/src/components/NewRepairTicketF: A dialog form for creating a new repair ticket, collecting asset serial number, fault description, technician, outcome, and parts replaced, then submitting via useCreateRepairTicket.
frontend/src/components/PartsReplacedEdi: A form editor component for managing a list of replaced parts, allowing users to add, remove, and update part selections and quantities via dropdowns and number inputs.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and select a role to complete initial profile setup before accessing the app.
frontend/src/components/RepairsByStageCh: A bar chart card component that visualizes repair ticket counts grouped by workflow stage using Recharts, with a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/RepairTicketDeta: A modal dialog that displays full details of a repair ticket and allows authorized users to edit diagnosis, outcome, and parts replaced fields.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: The main navigation sidebar with role-based visible nav items, active route highlighting, user profile display, and a branding footer.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small badge component that renders a color-coded label for either an asset status or a repair outcome enum value.
frontend/src/components/StockAdjustmentM: A modal dialog for incrementing or decrementing a part's inventory stock quantity, with add/remove toggle and quantity input.
frontend/src/components/TopFailingModels: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top failing device models (VX680, VX820, M400, Carbon 10, Carbon 8) sorted by repair count, using Recharts and data from the `useTopFailingModels` hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via `@dfinity/auth-client`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a comprehensive set of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on assets, repair tickets, parts, users, audit entries, clients, and dashboard statistics against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Provides a `ThemeProvider` and `useTheme` hook that persist and toggle between dark and light themes via localStorage and a CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS base styles, OKLCH design tokens for light and dark modes (colors, sidebar, charts), and typography using Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AssetsPage.tsx: Renders a paginated, filterable, and searchable table of registered device assets with support for adding, viewing details, and deleting assets via query hooks and modal/form components.
frontend/src/pages/AuditLogPage.tsx: Displays a paginated, searchable table of audit trail entries fetched via `useGetAuditTrail`, showing timestamp, entity type/ID, changed-by user, and description.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Renders the main dashboard with KPI cards (total assets, in-repair, open tickets, low stock), repair-stage and top-failing-model charts, a low-stock alert, and recent repairs/assets tables.
frontend/src/pages/PartsInventoryPage.ts: Parts inventory page with a searchable table of parts, a low-stock alert, a stock-adjustment modal, and an 'Add New Part' dialog that submits to the `useAddPart` mutation.
frontend/src/pages/RepairTicketsPage.tsx: Lists repair tickets with search and stage/outcome filters, and provides a 'New Ticket' button that opens `NewRepairTicketForm` and row-click access to `RepairTicketDetailModal`.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Analytics page showing bar charts for repair frequency by asset, parts usage, and technician workload, plus tables for most-replaced parts, repeated-fault assets, and assets exceeding yearly repair limits with configurable thresholds.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: React settings page providing UI for managing users (add, update role) and clients (add, rename, delete) via dialogs, tables, and form controls using custom query hooks.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility module that exports assets and repair tickets to CSV files by formatting data with helper functions and triggering a browser download.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Provides formatting helpers for timestamps, asset statuses, repair outcomes, and user roles, plus nanosecond/date conversion utilities and static constant arrays.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode via class, extending the theme with OKLCH CSS-variable-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, accordion animations, and typography/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, and existing feature work focused on fixing dark mode text contrast across KPI cards, chart widgets, and dashboard sections.
